presentation.latex: the parameters: a joint setting θ = ( θa)a∈A yields a concrete unweighted PDGM = M(θ)—which, at a syntactic level, is just a collection of cpds. When constructing PDGs from known cpds (e.g.,p(Y|X )), we use the mathematical symbol representing that cpd (e.g., p) for both the arca and its associated cpdPa.
